repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Mostly small runs of periodicals on a variety of human sexuality subjects, including lesbians, gay men, bisexuals, transsexuals and transgender people, AIDS, feminism, and gender and sexual identity. Titles may be published in the United States or internationally.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Male Model Pornography Magazines Single Issues, #7633

p.emph: Read the following for information regarding finding periodicals:

odd.head: General
odd.p: All the individual titles that comprise this collection are included in the bibliographies of U.S. and international periodicals in the Human Sexuality Collection, available at http://rmc.library.cornell.edu/HSC/per.htm . If no call number is listed next to a title on that page or the collection number 7687 is listed then the item should be found in this miscellaneous collection and can be requested by the box number using the listing below.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Miscellaneous human sexuality periodicals, #7687. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Single issues or small runs of periodicals on a variety of human sexuality subjects, including lesbians, gay men, bisexuals, transsexuals and transgender people, AIDS, feminism, and gender and sexual identity. Titles may be published in the United States or internationally.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Mostly small runs of periodicals on a variety of human sexuality subjects, including lesbians, gay men, bisexuals, transsexuals and transgender people, AIDS, feminism, and gender and sexual identity. Titles may be published in the United States or internationally.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Includes conference brochures from the 1963 and 1964 conferences of ECHO, East Coast Homophile Organizations. Bringing together the Daughters of Bilitis, the Janus Society, and the New York City and Washington, DC chapters of the Mattachine Society, ECHO was the first attempt to create a national coalition of organizations focused on equal rights for lesbians and gay men in the United States.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Includes conference brochures from the 1963 and 1964 conferences of ECHO, East Coast Homophile Organizations. Bringing together the Daughters of Bilitis, the Janus Society, and the New York City and Washington, DC chapters of the Mattachine Society, ECHO was the first attempt to create a national coalition of organizations focused on equal rights for lesbians and gay men.
